package rulecoverage

func PositiveRouterSetupRunsMigrations() string {
    ruleID := "router_setup_runs_migrations"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Gin router or handler setup code that also performs migrations."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
